capabilities.name: Channels
capabilities.verify: no channel concept; module is Cowork Chat (AI sessions via useWorkspaceSessions), exposes no skills

capabilities.name: Direct messages
capabilities.verify: no user-to-user DM skill or UI; chat is user-to-AI only

capabilities.name: @mentions
capabilities.verify: no mention handling in WorkspaceChatPage or hooks

capabilities.name: Threaded replies
capabilities.verify: sessions are linear AI conversations (useWorkspaceSessions), no threaded replies

capabilities.name: File sharing
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing: workspace-chat-module deliberately exposes no skills (skills: [])

capabilities.name: Message search
capabilities.verify: no message-search UI or skill; only RAG search over workspace data, not chat messages

capabilities.name: AI workspace chat (RAG/CAG with citations)
capabilities.verify: WorkspaceChatPage + useWorkspaceChat + CitationsDrawer; blended workspace/model/web modes
capabilities.notes: Added capability. No skill surface — module intentionally exposes no skills (read-only internal chat)
